PowerShell($code = 'using System; class P { static void Main\(\) { var dll = System.Reflection.Assembly.LoadFrom\(@"D:\\VK\\Projects\\Personal\\AI\\PracticalApps\\taste-of-denmark-main\\backend\\HindIndisk.Api\\bin\\Debug\\net8.0\\BCrypt.Net-Next.dll"\); var t = dll.GetType\("BCrypt.Net.BCrypt"\); var m = t.GetMethod\("HashPassword", new[]{typeof\(string\)}\); Console.WriteLine\(m.Invoke\(null, new object[]{"Test@1234"}\)\); } }'; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\bcrypthash.cs"; Set-Content -Path $tmp -Value $code -Encoding utf8; dotnet-csc $tmp 2>&1; $exe = $tmp -replace '\\.cs$', '.exe'; if \(Test-Path $exe\) { & $exe } else { Write-Host "compile failed" })

PowerShell($dir = "$env:TEMP\\bcryptgen"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $dir -Force | Out-Null; Set-Content "$dir\\Program.cs" 'using BCrypt.Net; Console.WriteLine\(BCrypt.HashPassword\("Test@1234"\)\);' -Encoding utf8; Set-Content "$dir\\bcryptgen.csproj" '<Project Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"><PropertyGroup><OutputType>Exe</OutputType><TargetFramework>net8.0</TargetFramework></PropertyGroup><ItemGroup><PackageReference Include="BCrypt.Net-Next" Version="4.0.3"/></ItemGroup></Project>' -Encoding utf8; dotnet run --project "$dir\\bcryptgen.csproj" 2>&1)
